    ✦ Face Vital Scan🔒 HIPAA PrivateHIPAA PrivateThe Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act (HIPAA) sets national standards for protecting sensitive patient health information. Your scan data is encrypted, never sold, and handled in full compliance with HIPAA regulations.

    Your vitals in 30 seconds.
    Just your face.

    Heart rate, blood pressure, HRV and 30+ clinical vitals — measured from a 30-second face scan. Then chat with Cira about the results.

    "Health is personal. Cira meets you in your own words."

    Cira doesn't guess.
    She thinks.

    Cira is trained on hundreds of millions of clinical cases, peer-reviewed medical studies, and real diagnostic data from around the world.

    When you describe your symptoms — she doesn't search for keywords. She thinks through every possible combination. Every diagnostic pathway. Every risk factor. Every contraindication.

    Then she adds your real vitals from the scan.

    And she tells you what the combination means. Not a list of possibilities. A specific assessment. Backed by real data.

    📚

    Trained on peer-reviewed medical literature and hundreds of millions of clinical cases

    🧠

    Multiple diagnostic pathways evaluated simultaneously — not sequential guessing

    🔄

    Cross-references your symptoms with your real clinical vitals from the face scan

    📋

    Produces structured health assessments that mirror real clinical consultations

    "Your blood pressure is 138/88 and your heart rate is 102. Combined with the chest tightness you're describing and your HRV drop of 22% — this pattern is consistent with acute cardiovascular stress. This is not something to sleep on. Go to a clinic or emergency room within the next two hours. I've prepared a complete summary of everything I found for your doctor."

    — Cira

    Cira does not replace professional medical advice.
    All assessments should be reviewed with a qualified physician.

    The scan is not an estimate.
    It's clinical technology.

    The face scan powering Cira uses clinically validated health monitoring technology with signal fusion — beat-by-beat blending of rPPG and rBCG signals, selecting the strongest data from each source in real time. The result: consistent accuracy across all skin tones, all lighting conditions, and all devices.

    7M+

    Real-world samples in training data

    20%

    BP accuracy gain in elevated range

    80+

    Healthcare partners

    33

    Countries worldwide

    🔬

    Signal Fusion — beat by beat

    Two parallel signals — rPPG (skin colour changes from blood flow) and rBCG (micro-movements from heartbeats) — are processed simultaneously. The SDK selects the strongest beats from whichever source is best at any given moment.

    🧠

    Neural 3D face tracking

    A neural network builds a 3D face mask and realigns it throughout the scan. A dual-tracker architecture keeps the measurement running even if you shift position, tilt your head, or adjust your grip.

    📊

    Measurement Quality Guidance

    Before the scan: coaching on positioning and lighting. During: live quality feedback. After: results with a quality rating and tips for improvement. A 7-component Environmental Quality Index ensures clinical rigour.

    🔒

    100% on-device processing

    Your camera feed is never recorded, transmitted, or stored. Everything runs locally on your phone. Nothing leaves your device. Ever.

    Proven accurate in clinical studies.

    Blood pressure accuracy improved 20% in the elevated range (140–170 mmHg). Body composition accuracy improved 45% with retrained models on millions of samples.

    MetricTimeAccuracy
    Heart Rate30 sec0.13 MAE
    Heart Rate Variability30 sec3.28 MAE
    Breathing Rate30 sec1.12 MAE
    Systolic Blood Pressure30 sec9.23 MAE
    Diastolic Blood Pressure30 sec6.09 MAE
    Body Mass Index30 sec2.84 MAE

    Source: SDK 3.0 clinical validation studies

    Trusted by 80+ healthcare partners in 33 countries

    AllianzDeutsche TelekomDr.DigitalHearteryCAREMINDr

    "This technology helped us become the #1 blood pressure app in the US, UK, Canada and Australia."

    — Leo Rosenbaum, Founder of Heartery

    Undergoing EU Medical Device Regulation certification. Strict precision mode suppresses results when quality falls below clinical threshold. All processing on your device. Nothing sent to any server. Ever.

    See what your body is actually saying.

    Cira uses clinically validated camera technology to read 30+ vital signs from your face in 30 seconds. Blood pressure. Heart rate. HRV. Stress index. Breathing rate. No hardware. No wearables. Just your camera.

    All processing on your device. Nothing stored without your permission.

    What you see vs what the AI reads beneath your skin

    rPPG analyzes subtle color changes in your skin caused by blood flow. rBCG detects micro-movements generated by your heartbeat. Both running simultaneously. All from your camera.

    30+ health markers. From your face. In 30 seconds.

    Vital Signs

    Measured entirely from the face scan

    • Blood Pressure
    • Heart Rate
    • Heart Rate Variability
    • Cardiac Workload
    • Breathing Rate
    • Stress Index
    • Body Mass Index
    • Parasympathetic Activity

    Health Indices

    Based on scan and user data

    • Vascular Age
    • Wellness Score
    • Waist-to-Height Ratio
    • Body Fat Percentage
    • Basal Metabolic Rate
    • Body Shape Index
    • Total Daily Energy Expenditure

    Health Risks

    Based on scan and user data

    • Cardiovascular Risk Score
    • Coronary Heart Disease Risk
    • Stroke Risk
    • Heart Failure Risk
    • Diabetes Risk
    • Fatty Liver Disease Risk
    • Cardiovascular Event Risk

    Clinically validated · Undergoing EU Medical Device Regulation certification

    Every scan saved. Your health history built automatically.

    Every time you use Cira — the conversation, the scan, the result — saved to your personal dashboard. Your own medical file. Built scan by scan. Owned entirely by you.

    askainurse.com/dashboard

    "Your medical history. Built automatically. Every time you use Cira."

    One click. Your doctor gets everything.

    Every visit. Every scan. Every result. One page. Ready in 30 seconds.

    Cira Health Summary

    Period: Oct 2025 → Mar 2026

    Scans completed: 24

    Blood Pressure121/79 ↑ Rising
    Heart Rate68 bpm ↔ Stable
    HRV38ms ↓ Declining
    Stress IndexElevated ↑ Sustained

    Cira noticed:

    • BP elevated on 6 occasions
    • HRV declining 5 weeks straight
    • Stress peaks every Monday

    Questions for your doctor:

    • Should the HRV decline concern us?
    • Is the BP trend worth treating now?

    Powered by Cira

    "For the first time — arrive at your doctor's with real data in your hands."

    See a real doctor. Today. Anywhere.

    Choose the specialist you need. A licensed doctor will take care of you.

    GPPediatricsPsychologySexologyWeight lossCardiology

    Satisfaction guaranteed or reimbursed.

    Licensed physicians · Available globally 24/7

    Jean-Marc

    "I built Cira because I have high blood pressure and high cholesterol. Every time I see my doctor I arrived with nothing. Last week my scan showed pulse 102 and BP 135/86. For the first time — I had something real to show my doctor."

    — Jean-Marc, Founder

    About us

    Your AI health nurse — anytime, anywhere.

    askainurse.com is a clinical-grade AI health platform that combines a conversational AI nurse with a 60-second face scan. We help you understand your vitals, document symptoms, and walk into every doctor's appointment prepared — all from your phone.

    01

    Talk to Cira

    Chat with our AI nurse 24/7 in 16+ languages. Describe your symptoms, ask health questions, get clinically grounded guidance.

    02

    Scan your vitals

    A 60-second face scan measures heart rate, blood pressure, HRV, stress, breathing, and 10+ other vitals — using your camera only.

    03

    Get a real report

    Receive a downloadable clinical PDF with your vitals, AI assessment, and recommendations — ready to share with your doctor.

    How it works

    1. Open Cira — no app download. Works in your browser on any phone or laptop.

    2. Face scan — our clinically validated rPPG technology (the same signal-fusion approach used in hospital studies) reads your vitals from subtle skin-color changes captured by your camera. 100% on-device — no video leaves your phone.

    3. AI consultation — Cira analyzes your vitals alongside your symptoms, asks the right follow-up questions, and provides a structured clinical assessment.

    4. Doctor-ready report — every consultation generates a PDF report you can save, track over time, or share with a licensed physician through our doctor network.

    Cira is an AI health nurse — not a replacement for a licensed doctor. For emergencies, always call your local emergency services.

    FAQ

    Frequently asked questions.

    Your AI health nurse — clinically validated vitals, available anytime.

    Your privacy

    We use strictly necessary cookies to run Cira, and optional cookies for analytics and saved preferences. You can change your choice anytime from the footer. Privacy Policy.
